description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The sole function of Step 0 is to establish the Net Revenue of the Sky Protocol. It performs no allocations to downstream functions or buffers, unlike subsequent steps for which this Net Revenue serves as the input.
All items of Income and Expense are recognized on a "cash basis" based on when USDS/DAI enter or leave the Sky Surplus Buffer, Core Council Buffer, or Aligned Delegates Buffer.

The sole function of Step 0 is to establish the Net Revenue of the Sky Protocol. It performs no allocations to downstream functions or buffers, unlike subsequent steps for which this Net Revenue serves as the input.
All items of Income and Expense are recognized on a "cash basis" based on when USDS/DAI enter or leave the Sky Surplus Buffer
out of accounts other than the Sky Surplus
in [A.2.3.1.4.1.1.1.6.4 - Expense Recognition For Legacy Account Consolidation](1760b35f-da5a-4504-a014-dd7a611b4c0e)

description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The sole function of Step 0 is to establish the Net Revenue of the Sky Protocol. It performs no allocations to downstream functions or buffers, unlike subsequent steps for which this Net Revenue serves as the input.
All items of Income and Expense are recognized on a "cash basis" based on when USDS/DAI enter or leave the Sky Surplus Buffer, Core Council Buffer, or Aligned Delegates Buffer.

The sole function of Step 0 is to establish the Net Revenue of the Sky Protocol. It performs no allocations to downstream functions or buffers, unlike subsequent steps for which this Net Revenue serves as the input.

in [A.2.3.1.4.1.1.1.6.4 - Expense Recognition For Legacy Account Consolidation](1760b35f-da5a-4504-a014-dd7a611b4c0e)

The sole function of Step 0 is to establish the Net Revenue of the Sky Protocol. It performs no allocations to downstream functions or buffers, unlike subsequent steps for which this Net Revenue serves as the input.

All items of Income and Expense are recognized on a "cash basis" based on when USDS/DAI enter or leave the Sky Surplus Buffer. Transfers out of accounts other than the Sky Surplus Buffer are not recognized as Expenses, except as provided in [A.2.3.1.
